rulings.Case Title: GURSON S. DANG VS. MADELEINE MURPHY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, SEPTEMBER 20, 2006. DEFENDANTS MADELEINE MURPHY, 1686 GREAT HIGHWAY ASSOCIATION BOARD OF DIRECTORS, SURESH B. SHAH AND KENNETH A. BAME DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. 1.) DECLARATORY RELIEF, OVERRULED. 2.)CONSPIRACY, SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND, NEEDS TO STATE WHAT WRONGFUL ACTS AGREED TO BETWEEN PARTIES. 3.) INTERFERENCE WITH PROSPECTIVE ADVANTAGE SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. 4.) PUNITIVES NOT CAUSE OF ACTION, SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO APPEND TO PROPER CAUSE OF ACTION. =(302/REQ/KD)
